title: Anthropic Files For IPO, Public Markets Asked Not To Read Too Much Into It — Aninews ep 17
desc: Daily AI news satire. Anthropic confidentially files for IPO at a ~$965B private valuation — the safety company walks its carefully-worded S-1 into the least careful machine in finance.
notes: Aninews ep 17. New entry — script creates the tracker doc. Anthropic IPO S-1 filing. Cyberpunk public-market launch facility trope with SEC intake hall, valuation tower, market-conditions gate. 12 beats, Seedance 720p, Schedar voice.

title: Nvidia Declares A New Era Of The PC, In Which The PC Is Also Nvidia — Aninews ep 16
desc: Daily AI news satire. At Computex, Nvidia unveiled its first Windows-laptop chip — a 20-core CPU with a desktop-class GPU — and declared 'a new era of PC'; it already supplies most of the AI industry, so the new era still runs on Nvidia.
notes: Aninews ep 16. New entry — script creates the tracker doc. Nvidia N1X / RTX Spark laptop chip. Reused locked huang.png ref; Seedance 720p.

title: SpaceX Files Plans For A $119 Billion Chip Factory To Feed Musk's Four Other Companies — Aninews ep 14
desc: Daily AI news satire. SpaceX disclosed in a federal filing that Terafab, its planned chip factory outside Austin, could cost up to $119B across all phases — and every customer of the fab (SpaceX rockets, Tesla cars, Tesla robots, xAI data centers) is also an owner.
notes: Aninews ep 14. New entry — script will create the tracker doc. Follow-up update_project sets longDesc + link to TikTok URL. First episode using the new fast multi-strike + no-slow-motion Seedance prompt pattern.

title: My AI Video Maker Followed the Wrong Rules Perfectly
desc: I built an AI video maker, then watched it make a video that confused me. The scary part: it wasn't ignoring the rules. It was following the wrong ones perfectly.
notes: Spoolcast dev log 9. YouTube video is published; script should build the guidebook and create one tracker entry.

title: Anthropic buys Stainless, the toolmaker behind every major AI company
